# @platform/graphql-browser-client

Browser-safe GraphQL transport client: turns generated TypedDocumentNode operations into POST /api/graphql requests.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/graphql-browser-client
Version: 0.1.0
Component: graphql-browser-client
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: experience
Bounded context: graphql-client
Owner: team-ui
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-ui
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Convert generated TypedDocumentNode operations into a GraphQL query string via graphql/language/printer
- POST { query, variables } to the BFF /api/graphql endpoint with credentials
- Centralise GraphQL transport error handling into a single typed GraphQLClientError

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not own GraphQL operation definitions (those live in @platform/contracts-graphql)
- Does not create TanStack Query hooks (feature code owns those)
- Does not import graphql execution, schema, or any server/platform-api package
- Does not render React components

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Feature hooks call graphqlRequest(SomeDocument, variables) with a generated document
- Tests inject a fetch implementation via createGraphQLClient({ fetchImpl })

application
feature
test

contract
